directions_tried.name: Direction A: Rigorous Derivation
directions_tried.outcome: Formula R_δ ≤ S_max/S_T − 1 confirmed correct. Holevo bound is essential bridge.

directions_tried.name: Direction B: Concrete Computations
directions_tried.outcome: Budget computed for 7 systems. Only constraining at Planck scale.

directions_tried.name: Direction C: Prior Art Search
directions_tried.outcome: PARTIALLY KNOWN. Structural form exists. Bekenstein connection is novel.

directions_tried.name: Direction D: Stress-Test Objections
directions_tried.outcome: PARTIALLY SURVIVED. 2 SERIOUS objections, no FATAL. Catch-22 identified.

directions_tried.name: Direction E: Operationally Relevant Budget
directions_tried.outcome: BH horizon only constraining system. Bekenstein overestimates by 16-80 orders.

directions_tried.name: Direction F: BH Horizon Implications
directions_tried.outcome: M-independent universal constants: S = 1/(540 ln2), R_1bit = 7.21 r_s.

directions_tried.name: Direction G: QG Reformulation
directions_tried.outcome: Structural catch-22 resolved. QD↔HQEC mapping is new. HaPPY at 50%.
